---
title: "distribution"
---

Routnined for plotting probability density functions (PDFs) and cumulative distribution functions (CDFs) of the data.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`plotting/with_matplotlib/distribution.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/distribution.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `DistributionPlotter` {#distributionplotter}

```python
class DistributionPlotter
```

Class for plotting probability density functions (PDFs) and cumulative distribution functions (CDFs) of the data.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/distribution.py#L7){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `DistributionPlotter.__init__` {#distributionplotter-__init__}

```python
def __init__(self, fix, ax)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/distribution.py#L9){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `DistributionPlotter.cdf` {#distributionplotter-cdf}

```python
def cdf(self, x: np.ndarray, color='blue', label=None)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/distribution.py#L13){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `DistributionPlotter.pdf` {#distributionplotter-pdf}

```python
def pdf(self, x: np.ndarray, bins=typing.Literal['sqrtN'], color='blue', label=None)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/plotting/with_matplotlib/distribution.py#L22){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
